hero.heading: AI Appointment Scheduling
hero.description: Never miss an appointment or double-book again. Your AI assistant automatically manages scheduling, reminders, and rescheduling — keeping your calendar full and your clients happy.

keyCapabilities.heading: Key Capabilities:
keyCapabilities.description: Streamline your client scheduling process with intelligent automation that saves time, reduces no-shows, and ensures a smoother customer experience.

features.title: Fully Automated:
features.description: Books, reschedules, and cancels appointments directly into your calendar.

features.title: Calendar Syncing:
features.description: Works seamlessly with Google Calendar, Outlook Calendar, and Cal.com.

features.title: Smart Reminders:
features.description: Clients automatically receive SMS and email confirmations and reminders, cutting down no-shows.

features.title: Flexible Options:
features.description: Choose whether to use your new dedicated number or keep your current one with forwarding.

topCard.title: Save Hours of Manual Work:
topCard.description: You and your team no longer need to manage calls or track appointments manually.

bottomCards.title: Reduce No-Shows by 40%
bottomCards.description: Automated reminders and confirmations keep your schedule full and reliable.

bottomCards.title: Improve Client Experience
bottomCards.description: Clients enjoy instant, accurate booking interactions anytime, anywhere.

bottomCards.title: Boost Efficiency
bottomCards.description: Focus your time on delivering services instead of managing logistics.

finalCta.heading: Ready to Automate Your Scheduling?
finalCta.description: Empower your business with intelligent appointment automation. Save time, reduce cancellations, and deliver a seamless experience to every client.
